//: JSON-form sibling pin map. The plain-text `.github/sibling-pins` file is the source of truth for codetracer's existing tooling (grep-based lookups in CI scripts and detect-siblings.sh); this JSON file mirrors the BEAM-flow-relevant subset for cross-repo CI workflows that prefer structured sibling-pin manifests (see codetracer-beam-recorder/.github/sibling-pins.json for the convention). Update both files when bumping a sibling SHA used by BEAM tests.
